features: PERFECT GIFT FOR THE MODERN GENTLEMAN: THEMANCODE Solid Cologne, the perfect gift for the man who appreciates refined elegance. Perfect for birthdays, Father’s Day, Valentines, Christmas, Stocking Fillers for Men or any special occasion
VERSATILE & CONVENIENT: This solid perfume set offers timeless, masculine scents for dates, business meetings, and travel. A little goes a long way, with options to match your mood or setting
TRAVEL SIZE: Each cologne comes in a convenient 0.5 oz size, perfect for travel or everyday carry
SOLID Cologne: Non-liquid formulation eliminates spills and makes these colognes ideal for on-the-go application
NATURAL SCENTS: Premium collection of four distinct solid colognes featuring Sandalwood, Vetiver, Cedarwood, and Sage scents
